commands: python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
python -m pip install -r apps/backend/requirements.txt || python -m pip install -r requirements.txt

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f app/main.py ]; then :; elif [ -f apps/backend/app/main.py ]; then cd apps/backend; fi; uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
